title: hepetis altensteinii
intro: Hepetis altensteinii, also known as Sweet Gale, is a type of flowering plant native to eastern Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hepetis altensteinii include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in essential oil form for its aromatic and therapeutic properties.
